name: Crispy Oven-Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a blender, combine the cornflakes, grated Parmesan, paprika, and garlic salt. Spray the potato slices with oil, then coat them evenly with the cornflake mixture. Place the potatoes on a well-greased baking sheet. Bake for 20-25 minutes, turning off the heat when the potatoes are golden brown and crispy.
